concept: Cook up a platformer where gravity intensifies with each successful jump, making movement progressively heavier and jumps shorter as levels progress. Special platforms temporarily reset gravitational accumulation, creating strategic pathways that must be carefully planned to reach seemingly impossible heights. Environmental interaction is affected by your current gravity level - heavier states can activate pressure plates or break through weakened surfaces while lighter states allow floating on water or being carried by wind currents. Advanced techniques include intentionally maxing out gravitational build-up to perform devastating ground pounds that alter the terrain. The final challenge requires perfect gravity management through an obstacle course where both insufficient and excessive gravity are equally deadly.
